title: Intense Snappy Argentinian Toor Dal
description: A halal-friendly Argentinian dish featuring toor dal, with a yeasty and snappy flavor profile, made with a deglaze-fond for added depth
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat
Add the sliced red onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize
Add the diced red bell pepper and cook for an additional 2 minutes
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning
Add the toor dal, argentinian chimichurri, active dry yeast, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine
Add the water to the saucepan and bring to a boil
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the toor dal is tender
Use a deglaze-fond technique to add a rich and intense flavor to the dish, by stirring in a small amount of the cooking liquid and scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the saucepan
Serve the intense snappy argentinian toor dal hot, garnished with fresh herbs or a sprinkle of paprika
